name: Censys
description: Imports internet/attack-surface data from Censys (https://search.censys.io). Each host becomes an ASSET (IP, OS), each exposed service a SERVICE (host:port), and detected software CPEs are linked to the asset. Offline mode: parse a Censys hosts export / API JSON (a list of hosts, or a v2 hosts-search `{result:{hits:[...]}}` response). Live mode: if `query` is set and CENSYS_API_ID / CENSYS_API_SECRET are in the worker env, calls the v2 hosts search API (needs `pip install requests`). Read-only OSINT (non-intrusive). No DB access in run.py (worker-safe).

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path on the worker to a Censys hosts JSON (export or v2 hosts-search response) to import.

parameters.name: query
parameters.help: Live mode: Censys hosts search query (e.g. `services.service_name: HTTP and location.country: FR`). Needs CENSYS_API_ID/SECRET in the worker env.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.help: Live mode: maximum number of hosts to import.
